creator: kristinacors
caption: Watch until the end for all the info on how to apply for this free trip to Finland! #travelhacks #travelbucketlist #freetravel #corporatemillennial #corporateburnout

transcription.text: Country is practically paying you to travel, so Finland is giving away free trips to teach people how to be happy. Six couples will be chosen to spend an entire week in Finland, all expenses paid with the goal of uncovering how to be happy as a Finn. If you didn't know, Finland has been named the happiest country on earth for eight years in a row according to the United Nations. They say it's the happiest because of people's friendliness, their freedom of choice, and the high life expectancy. The tourism board Visit Finland is offering those selected the chance to immerse themselves in Finnish culture and explore Finnish lake land where they can experience breathtaking landscapes like twinkling lagoons and thick forests. For the chance to get selected, you have to apply and it's a two-step application including a social media video challenge. Apply at chillingafinn.com and hurry because applications close on March 29th. If you get selected, you're flying to Finland in June for a week. So who would you bring on the stream trip? Tag your travel buddy and follow for more travel hacks and opportunities like this.
